description: FGAP-034: the substrate-driven apply path runs the same in-execution structural self-check as the orchestrator-driven apply path, so the structural gates (coverage, distribution, and future checks) are enforced uniformly across both apply attach points.
acceptance_criteria: The substrate-driven apply path runs the same in-execution structural self-check as the orchestrator-driven apply path: a structural failure causes a nonzero exit and the output is not written; demonstrated on an input that fails a structural check.
A structurally-passing input is written by the substrate path; demonstrated.
Both apply attach points enforce the same structural checks; confirmed.
No previously-passing check moves from passing to failing: outputs parse, the project gate is green, and the existing apply tests stay passing.
